description_long: This is a large, rectangular outdoor dumpster with a dark green metal body and a black, ribbed, split lid on top. The lid is composed of two hinged sections, each with a corrugated texture for added strength and grip. The sides of the dumpster are reinforced with horizontal ridges, and there are protruding rectangular structures on each end, likely for lifting or securing the dumpster. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for heavy-duty waste collection in urban environments. No wheels or visible handles are present, and the exterior is free of any warning labels or signage.
description: A large, green metal dumpster with a black, ribbed, split lid and reinforced sides, designed for outdoor waste collection. It features a sturdy, industrial appearance with no visible wheels or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split, ribbed black lid and the reinforced green metal body with side protrusions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the dumpster, the ribbed lid, and the absence of wheels or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain green metal surface with side protrusions and the back edge of the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the length, ribbed lid, and structural details.
attribute_lid_type: split, hinged, ribbed plastic lid with two sections; no visible locking or opening mechanisms
